citations.narrative:
Two rusty metal cans being used as food scoops are stored in the chicken feed bin. Use of food receptacles that are rusty
and cannot be readily cleaned and sanitized may contaminate food for birds. Food receptacles must be made of a durable
material that can easily be cleaned and sanitized or be replaceable when worn or soiled.
Correct by 13 February 2026.

citations.desc: Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control.
citations.narrative:
The facility does not have an effective program to control mammalian pests as evidenced by the accumulation of rodent
droppings seen on door ledges and on top of bins and buckets in the food storage area for chickens. Pests such as
rodents can adversely affect the health and well-being of animals by spreading disease and contaminating food, surfaces,
and animal housing areas. A safe and effective program for the control of insects, ectoparasites, and avian and
mammalian pests shall be established and maintained.
Correct by 20 February 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
n

narrative:
3.155(b) 
   
Feeding 
Two rusty metal cans being used as food scoops are stored in the chicken feed bin. Use of food receptacles that are rusty 
and cannot be readily cleaned and sanitized may contaminate food for birds. Food receptacles must be made of a durable 
material that can easily be cleaned and sanitized or be replaceable when worn or soiled.  
 
Correct by 13 February 2026. 
3.158(d) 
   
Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control. 
The facility does not have an effective program to control mammalian pests as evidenced by the accumulation of rodent 
droppings seen on door ledges and on top of bins and buckets in the food storage area for chickens. Pests such as 
rodents can adversely affect the health and well-being of animals by spreading disease and contaminating food, surfaces, 
and animal housing areas. A safe and effective program for the control of insects, ectoparasites, and avian and 
mammalian pests shall be established and maintained. 
 
Correct by 20 February 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
